title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Brigade Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Brigade Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
